name: Lemon Cheesecake Bars
recipeIngredient: 1 package (8 oz) fat-free cream cheese, softened
1/3 cup lemon juice at room temperature
1 tablespoon skim milk at room temperature
4 tablespoons lemon juice at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare a 9 x 13 pan with cooking spray and flour.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine flour, 2/3 cup powdered sugar, and salt. Use a pastry blender to cut in margarine until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs. Press firmly over the bottom of the prepared pan.
4. Bake for 15 minutes. Cool for 10 minutes before topping with cheese mixture.
5. To prepare filling, combine cream cheese, 2/3 granulated sugar, egg whites, milk, lemon juice, and vanilla in another mixing bowl. Pour over baked crust.
6. Bake for 22 to 28 minutes or until firm. Meanwhile, to prepare glaze, combine 2 1/2 cups powdered sugar, vanilla, and milk. Add enough lemon juice to make a thick smooth glaze. Pour glaze over cheesecake base; smooth surface.
7. Cover and refrigerate overnight before cutting.
